name: Segmented

parameters.description: Data-driven options. When set, takes precedence over ChildContent. Leave null and pass SegmentedItem children for the compound-component flavour.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Compound-mode content — one or more SegmentedItem. Ignored when Options is set.

records.name: SegmentedContext
records.signature:
SegmentedContext(
        string? Value,
        EventCallback<string> Select,
        Func<bool, string> GetItemClasses)
records.description: Cascading context for compound-mode SegmentedItem children — they read the active value + the parent's item-class function (so style stays consistent with Options-mode) and invoke Select on click.

examples.title: With Disabled Option
examples.code: new SegmentedOption { Label = "Weekly", Value = "weekly", Disabled = true }

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The value selected when this item is clicked. Must match one of the parent Segmented's expected values.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Compound-mode content — one or more SegmentedItem. Ignored when Options is set.

mdSummary:
# Segmented

Pill-shaped tab-like single-select control.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/segmented

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Segmented | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Segmented | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Segmented | Options | `List<SegmentedOption>?` | `` | Data-driven options. When set, takes precedence over ChildContent. Leave null and pass SegmentedItem children for the compound-component flavour. |
| Segmented | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Compound-mode content — one or more SegmentedItem. Ignored when Options is set. |
| Segmented | Block | `bool` | `` |  |
| Segmented | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Segmented | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SegmentedItem | Context | `Segmented.SegmentedContext?` | `` |  |
| SegmentedItem | Value | `string` | `""` | The value selected when this item is clicked. Must match one of the parent Segmented's expected values. |
| SegmentedItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SegmentedItem | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional leading icon slot. |
| SegmentedItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| SegmentedItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Segmented) — Compound-mode content — one or more SegmentedItem. Ignored when Options is set.
- `ChildContent` (SegmentedItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (SegmentedItem) — Optional leading icon slot.

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`)

## Sub-components
- `SegmentedItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Segmented.SegmentedContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Segmented />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Segmented/Segmented.razor`
- `UI/Segmented/SegmentedItem.razor`
